item.description: In a primetime address to the nation President Trump castigated the security of the U.S. election system. Critics called out his speech for lacking new evidence to support his claims. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump calls for new election security measures
media:content.media:description: In a primetime address to the nation President Trump castigated the security of the U.S. election system. Critics called out his speech for lacking new evidence to support his claims. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

item.title: Trump calls for new election security measures

item.description: That dangerous wildfire smoke from Canada is now on the move and smothering new U.S. cities. NBC News’ Tom Costello has the latest.

media:content.media:title: 100 million Americans facing dangerous wildfire smoke
media:content.media:description: That dangerous wildfire smoke from Canada is now on the move and smothering new U.S. cities. NBC News’ Tom Costello has the latest.

item.title: 100 million Americans facing dangerous wildfire smoke

item.description: In a new statement, Taylor Farms says they are voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce from the U.S. market sourced from one Mexican farm. Taco Bell says they have removed all Taylor Farms lettuce from their restaurants and supply chain nationwide. NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports.

media:content.media:title: Taylor Farms and Taco Bell removes iceberg lettuce amid parasite outbreak
media:content.media:description: In a new statement, Taylor Farms says they are voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce from the U.S. market sourced from one Mexican farm. Taco Bell says they have removed all Taylor Farms lettuce from their restaurants and supply chain nationwide. NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports.

item.title: Taylor Farms and Taco Bell removes iceberg lettuce amid parasite outbreak

item.description: Oil prices spiked more than four percent today and gas prices are back near four dollars a gallon as traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz has been dropping while the U.S. and Iran launch new rounds of attacks. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

media:content.media:title: Gas prices rise as U.S. and Iran escalate attacks
media:content.media:description: Oil prices spiked more than four percent today and gas prices are back near four dollars a gallon as traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz has been dropping while the U.S. and Iran launch new rounds of attacks. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

item.title: Gas prices rise as U.S. and Iran escalate attacks

item.description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

media:content.media:title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.
media:content.media:description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

item.title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
item.description: Hundreds of people came to pay their last respects to the Mexican father of three who worked in construction and had lived in the U.S. for 35 years.

media:content.media:text: Public Viewing And Funeral Held For ICE Shooting Victim Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Ronaldo Salgado
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: People embrace as they pay their respects to Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a candlelight vigil on July 08, 2026 in Houston, Texas.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

item.title: Anguish and disbelief at wake for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, killed by ICE in Houston

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Two U.S. Forest Service employees were rescued with the help of negotiators after being zip-tied and held hostage for nearly 15 hours in Shasta-Trinity National Forest in Northern California, officials said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Mount Shasta in the Shasta-Trinity National Forest.
media:content.media:description: Mount Shasta in the Shasta-Trinity National Forest.

item.title: Two U.S. Forest Service employees rescued after being held hostage at gunpoint

item.dc:creator: Andrew Blankstein
Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: Pelosi, who’s married to Democratic Rep. Nancy Pelosi, previously pleaded guilty to driving under the influence in a 2022 car crash.

media:content.media:text: Paul and Nancy Pelosi arrive at the Pre-Grammy Gala
media:content.media:description: Paul and Nancy Pelosi arrive at the Pre-Grammy Gala on Jan. 31.

item.title: Paul Pelosi charged with misdemeanor hit-and-run after hitting parked car in California

item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
item.description: As heat waves and wildfire smoke sweep the country, see where it could be affecting you on the map and what you can do to curb the health risks.

media:content.media:text: An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
media:content.media:description: Wildfire smoke from Canada shrouds the sun as it rises behind the skyline of midtown Manhattan in New York City on Friday as seen from Jersey City, N.J.

media:content.media:text: An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
media:content.media:description: Wildfire smoke from Canada shrouds the sun as it rises behind the skyline of midtown Manhattan in New York City on Friday as seen from Jersey City, N.J.

media:content.media:text: An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
media:content.media:description: Wildfire smoke from Canada shrouds the sun as it rises behind the skyline of midtown Manhattan in New York City on Friday as seen from Jersey City, N.J.

item.title: Maps: Wildfire smoke forecast for the Midwest and northern U.S.

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump addresses the nation from the East Room of the White House on July 16, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump addresses the nation from the East Room of the White House on July 16, 2026.

item.title: Trump speech ripple effects: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
item.description: Nebraska Democratic Senate nominee Cindy Burbank has submitted a letter requesting her name be removed from the ballot, a move that would set up a one-on-one matchup between Republican Sen.

media:content.media:text: Cindy Burbank.
media:content.media:description: Cindy Burbank.

item.title: Democrat moves to drop out of Nebraska’s Senate race, clearing the path for an independent

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., in the special election to fill her late brother’s Senate seat for a full term.

media:content.media:text: Darline Graham Nordone places her hand on a bible and raises the other as she's sworn in, her husband stands next to her, and Chuck Grassley holds the bible as well standing across from her
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham to run for a full term to replace her late brother, Lindsey Graham, as the Republican nominee for Senate in South Carolina.

item.title: Trump backs Sen. Darline Graham in primary to replace her late brother

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Donike “”Donna” Gocaj, who fell into the 10-foot manhole full of scalding steam, suffered “unfathomable” pain, her family said in the suit.

media:content.media:text: Manhole cover at a crime scene.
media:content.media:description: A 56-year-old woman died after she fell into an uncovered manhole near East 52nd Street and Fifth Avenue in New York on May 19.

item.title: Family of woman who died after falling into uncovered NYC manhole files lawsuit

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin on Friday threatened state election officials.

media:content.media:text: Markwayne Mullin.
media:content.media:description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin speaks during a news conference Friday in Washington.

item.title: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin threatens states over elections after Trump speech

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Delman
item.description: I tested more than 50 beach products with my kids on three different beach days and these are the ones that made transport, cleanup and sun safety easy.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Daniel Landesman Photography; Kara Birnbaum / NBC
media:content.media:text: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: We overpacked the first two times
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Stylish and safe, she barely noticed she had on a lift vest.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Swimways makes safety gear that's actually adorable.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: We loaded the kids into the Voya and rolled through the sand; no walking, no complaints.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The add-on sand wheels on the Veer Cruiser made it so smooth through the sand.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Comfy and sturdy, the Yeti Hondo is a total game changer for sitting in the sand all day.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Izimini Booster chairs are cute and easy to set up, buckle for safety and come with a tray for meal time.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Daniel Landesman Photography; Courtesy Becca Delman
media:content.media:text: Yeti's cooler kept our food cold all day, and the backpack design made it so easy to haul across the sand.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Brush off the sand before you leave the beach — the Shakalo Sandscreen really works.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Lozi & Gabe's pop-up tent is big enough for the whole crew, plus every bag we brought along.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Aveeno sunscreen blended right in and felt weightless — sunscreen he didn't even notice.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The Bogg Bag fits everything, then wipes clean in seconds. No more sandy tote bags!
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Compact and leakproof, the Weezie is exactly what you want for a quick wet-item stash.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: These Aloha pouches saved the day — wet, sandy clothes went straight in, everything else stayed clean.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Packed once, fed all day — this Lalo bento box pulled its weight.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Water stayed cold all day in the Yeti rambler, even after hours baking in the sun.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The Pehr Swim two-piece made it fun and comfy for her to play in, and was easy to get her in and out of.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Customize your Native Jefferson shoes with Dekko Stickers.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Caden Lane's sun hat kept his face out of the sun all day and didn't budge even mid sandcastle-building.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Warm and cozy for the baby, straight out of the water and into this Poncho towel
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

item.title: The 25 must-haves that make beach days with kids easier

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: Prime members can get three months of Standard Audible for free. The member-exclusive deal also includes $20 in credits to spend on titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

item.title: Amazon is offering free months of Audible — but only for Prime members

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked to entomology experts to find the best products for preventing ticks on humans during prime tick season, including socks and sprays.

media:content.media:text: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.
media:content.media:description: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.

media:content.media:text: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.
media:content.media:description: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.

item.title: These are the best products to help keep ticks off of you

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Experts share tips and tricks to save money on your air conditioning bill, especially during the hot summer months and heat waves.

media:content.media:text: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.
media:content.media:description: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.

media:content.media:text: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.
media:content.media:description: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.

item.title: How to lower your air conditioning bill, according to experts

item.description: The man who allegedly breached security and shouted a racial slur at “TODAY” co-anchor Craig Melvin was arraigned on hate crime charges Friday.

media:content.media:description: Craig Melvin in 2024.

item.title: ‘TODAY’ show intruder arraigned on hate crime charges

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: Weeks after a 76-year-old woman was killed when a Tesla, operating on Full Self-Driving, crashed into her Texas home, the National Transportation Safety Board concluded that the car’s driver overrode the driver assistance mode and accelerated into the building.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash gif.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

item.title: Tesla driver whose car slammed into home overrode driver assistance mode, NTSB says

Bridget Bowman
